title: Resolution Approving and Adopting the Municipal Shcool Board Resolution No. 2022-15 Dated November 22, 2022 Entitled "resolution Approproating the Amount of Five Hundred Twenty-six Thousand Pesos (P 526,000.00) Chargeable Against the 2021 Special Education Fund Savings for Various Purpose As Supplemental Budget No.10 and Further Approving the Same." Councilwoman Leren Mae M. Bautista 01/16/2023
